_comment: Team name alias map for matching China Lottery / external source names to canonical team names. Canonical names must match the team_name field in data/processed/prematch_features.jsonl (not the numeric team_id in match_meta.jsonl).
_format: Each key is a canonical team name as it appears in prematch_features.jsonl. Each value is a list of alternate name strings (Chinese, abbreviated, or misspelled) that may appear in external odds sources and should resolve to that canonical name.
